name: Utopia AI
description: Utopia AI — Multilingual AI content moderation platform for detecting toxic language, spam, and policy violations in real time.

seo.title: Utopia AI — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Utopia AI: Utopia AI — Multilingual AI content moderation platform for detecting toxic language, spam, and policy violations in real time.

when_to_use: Moderating comments with multilingual hate speech detection
Running content classification for GDPR-regulated EU platforms
Building automated community safety filters for social features
Integrating real-time moderation into comment submission pipelines

pros: Strong Nordic and European language coverage
Real-time latency suitable for live channels
Custom model tuning for each customer
cons: Less known outside European media industry
review.verdict: Solid text moderation choice for European media and news; niche elsewhere and not cheap.
review.best_for: European news and media platforms moderating comments in multiple local languages.
review.not_for: US-only or multimodal use cases, or budget-constrained startups.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
